Test Case Description: Verify PDP loads successfully
Preconditions: Product URL is accessible; Product is active and available in current region
Expected Result: PDP loads without error, blank page, or broken layout

Test Case Description: Verify correct product is displayed on PDP
Steps: 1. Open PDP URL 2. Observe product details
Expected Result: Product details match the selected product

Test Case Description: Verify correct region-specific content is displayed on PDP
Preconditions: Site environment is correctly configured for AU/NZ
Expected Result: Region-specific content such as currency and delivery messaging is correct

Test Case Description: Verify PDP loads over HTTPS
Expected Result: PDP loads securely without browser security warning

Test Case Description: Verify no visible application error is shown on PDP
Expected Result: No visible application error, exception page, or major JS crash UI is shown

Test Case Description: Verify breadcrumb is displayed
Expected Result: Breadcrumb is visible and structured correctly

Test Case Description: Verify breadcrumb links redirect correctly
Expected Result: User is redirected to the correct category or landing page

Test Case Description: Verify product name is displayed
Expected Result: Product name is visible and correct

Test Case Description: Verify product price is displayed
Expected Result: Price is visible and formatted correctly for region

Test Case Description: Verify sale price presentation is correct
Expected Result: Sale price and original price are displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify promotional label or badge is displayed correctly
Expected Result: Badge text and placement are correct

Test Case Description: Verify SKU or product code is displayed if applicable
Preconditions: Product has SKU/code displayed on PDP
Expected Result: SKU/product code is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify product description is displayed
Expected Result: Product description is visible and readable

Test Case Description: Verify product attributes are displayed correctly
Preconditions: Product has attributes such as color, size, material, style code
Expected Result: Product attributes are displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify product title and description are consistent with selected variant
Steps: 1. Select a variant 2. Observe product info
Expected Result: Product info updates correctly for selected variant where applicable

Test Case Description: Verify main product image is displayed
Expected Result: Main product image is visible and rendered correctly

Test Case Description: Verify thumbnail images are displayed
Expected Result: All expected thumbnails are visible

Test Case Description: Verify selecting thumbnail updates main image
Expected Result: Main image updates to selected image

Test Case Description: Verify zoom functionality if available
Expected Result: Zoom works correctly without distortion

Test Case Description: Verify media gallery navigation controls if available
Expected Result: Images change correctly

Test Case Description: Verify product video is playable if available
Expected Result: Video plays correctly

Test Case Description: Verify color options are displayed correctly
Expected Result: All expected color options are visible

Test Case Description: Verify selecting a color updates product information correctly
Expected Result: Selected color is highlighted and relevant content updates correctly

Test Case Description: Verify selecting a color updates product images correctly
Expected Result: Image gallery updates to selected color where applicable

Test Case Description: Verify size options are displayed correctly
Expected Result: All expected size options are visible

Test Case Description: Verify unavailable size state is displayed correctly
Expected Result: Unavailable size is visually distinguished and cannot be selected if intended

Test Case Description: Verify selecting a size updates selected state correctly
Expected Result: Selected size is highlighted correctly

Test Case Description: Verify add to cart is blocked when required options are not selected
Steps: 1. Do not select required option(s) 2. Click Add to Cart
Expected Result: User cannot add to cart and appropriate validation is shown

Test Case Description: Verify variant selection is retained correctly before add to cart
Expected Result: Selected options remain correctly highlighted

Test Case Description: Verify in-stock state is displayed correctly
Expected Result: In-stock messaging/state is correct

Test Case Description: Verify out-of-stock state is displayed correctly
Expected Result: Out-of-stock messaging/state is correct

Test Case Description: Verify Add to Cart is unavailable for out-of-stock product
Expected Result: Add to Cart is disabled or unavailable as expected

Test Case Description: Verify low-stock messaging is displayed correctly if applicable
Expected Result: Low-stock messaging is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify Add to Cart button is displayed
Preconditions: In-stock product with required options selected if applicable
Expected Result: Add to Cart button is visible

Test Case Description: Verify product can be added to cart successfully from PDP
Steps: 1. Select required options 2. Click Add to Cart
Expected Result: Product is added to cart successfully

Test Case Description: Verify correct variant is added to cart
Steps: 1. Select color and size 2. Click Add to Cart 3. Open cart
Expected Result: Cart contains the selected variant with correct details

Test Case Description: Verify cart count updates after successful add to cart
Expected Result: Cart count updates correctly

Test Case Description: Verify add-to-cart success feedback is shown
Expected Result: Success message, mini-cart update, or confirmation UI is shown correctly

Test Case Description: Verify quantity defaults correctly before add to cart if quantity selector exists
Expected Result: Default quantity is correct

Test Case Description: Verify quantity can be updated before add to cart if supported
Expected Result: Selected quantity is added correctly

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist entry point is displayed
Expected Result: Wishlist entry point is visible

Test Case Description: Verify product can be added to wishlist
Preconditions: Wishlist feature enabled; User logged in if required
Expected Result: Product is added to wishlist successfully or login flow is triggered correctly

Test Case Description: Verify selected variant is handled correctly in wishlist flow
Expected Result: Wishlist captures correct product/variant behavior as designed

Test Case Description: Verify Find in Store entry point is displayed if feature is enabled
Expected Result: Find in Store link/button is visible

Test Case Description: Verify Find in Store opens correctly
Expected Result: Store finder modal/page opens correctly

Test Case Description: Verify delivery messaging is displayed correctly
Expected Result: Delivery message is visible and correct for region

Test Case Description: Verify pickup messaging is displayed correctly if applicable
Expected Result: Pickup messaging is correct

Test Case Description: Verify finance/payment promotional messaging is displayed correctly if applicable
Expected Result: Promo text and placement are correct

Test Case Description: Verify finance/payment CTA or modal opens correctly if applicable
Expected Result: Corresponding modal/page opens correctly

Test Case Description: Verify recommendation module is displayed if applicable
Expected Result: Recommendation module is visible

Test Case Description: Verify clicking recommended product redirects correctly
Expected Result: Correct PDP opens

Test Case Description: Verify accordion/tab sections are displayed correctly
Preconditions: PDP has accordion/tab content such as description, shipping, returns
Expected Result: Sections are visible and labeled correctly

Test Case Description: Verify accordion/tab expansion and collapse behavior
Expected Result: Sections behave correctly

Test Case Description: Verify shipping and returns information is displayed correctly if applicable
Expected Result: Content is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify no overlapping UI elements on PDP
Expected Result: No overlapping issue among header, gallery, CTA, sticky elements, chat widget, and footer

Test Case Description: Verify text is readable on PDP
Expected Result: No text is truncated, hidden, or unreadable

Test Case Description: Verify images are rendered without distortion
Expected Result: Images maintain expected aspect ratio and clarity

Test Case Description: Verify sticky add-to-cart behavior if applicable
Expected Result: Sticky ATC appears and behaves correctly

Test Case Description: Verify PDP layout on desktop viewport
Expected Result: Desktop layout is correct

Test Case Description: Verify PDP layout on tablet viewport
Expected Result: Tablet layout adapts correctly

Test Case Description: Verify PDP layout on mobile viewport
Expected Result: Mobile layout adapts correctly without horizontal overflow

Test Case Description: Verify product gallery behavior on mobile
Steps: 1. Open gallery on mobile 2. Swipe or navigate images
Expected Result: Mobile gallery behaves correctly

Test Case Description: Verify PDP load performance is acceptable
Expected Result: PDP loads within acceptable threshold

Test Case Description: Verify repeated variant switching does not break PDP
Expected Result: PDP remains stable without broken state or incorrect data

Test Case Description: Verify browser refresh retains valid PDP state
Steps: 1. Select variant if applicable 2. Refresh page
Expected Result: PDP reloads correctly and state behaves as designed

Test Case Description: Verify invalid or unavailable product URL is handled correctly
Expected Result: Proper error page, redirect, or unavailable state is shown

Test Case Description: Verify product view tracking is fired on PDP load
Expected Result: Expected product view event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify variant selection tracking is fired
Expected Result: Expected selection event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify add-to-cart tracking is fired from PDP
Steps: 1. Add product to cart from PDP
Expected Result: Expected add-to-cart event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify Find in Store click tracking is fired if applicable
Expected Result: Expected event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist click tracking is fired if applicable
Expected Result: Expected event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify event metadata is correct for PDP interactions
Expected Result: Event metadata such as product ID, variant, region, price, and module are correct
